question: Can you show me my upcoming schedule for the next week and set reminders for any important events?
task_description: The user wants to review their upcoming schedule for a specific time period (e.g., next week, next month) and receive reminders or notifications for important events based on their preferences.
task_goal: The user receives a summary of their upcoming schedule, with reminders or notifications set according to their preferred event types and notification preferences.
options:
A: Here is your upcoming schedule for the next week: 
- Sunday: Church service at 10 AM (with address and pastor's contact included)
- Wednesday: Prayer meeting at 5 PM (with location and contact details)
- Monday: Community meeting at 6 PM (with address and contact info)
Reminders are set to notify you one day before each event, and all notifications will be sent in Finnish as per your preference. Your family will also receive these shared event details. If you need to adjust anything, just let me know!
B: Your calendar now includes various events and notifications. Based on your previous requests, I've added reminders for church services, prayer meetings, community meetings, and other gatherings. If you need to see your schedule for next week or want to adjust notification settings, please let me know, as I'm not sure if this matches your preferences exactly.
C: Your calendar now includes church services, prayer meetings, and community meetings, with reminders set one day before in Finnish and shared with your family. If you need to see the specific schedule for next week or want to confirm any details, please let me know, as I'm not sure if this covers everything you wanted.
D: Here is your upcoming schedule for the next week: 
- Sunday: Church service at 10 AM at St. Mary's Cathedral (123 Church St.)
- Wednesday: Prayer meeting at 5 PM at Community Hall (456 Main Ave.)
- Monday: Community meeting at 6 PM at City Center (789 Central Blvd.)
Reminders are set one day before each event, and notifications will be sent in Finnish. All details are shared with your family. Let me know if you need anything else!
E: I've added your upcoming events for next week: Sunday yoga class at 9 AM, Wednesday book club at 7 PM, and Friday art workshop at 5 PM. Reminders are set one day before, and notifications will be sent in Finnish. All details are shared with your family. Let me know if you need anything else!
F: Your schedule for the next week includes: church service on Sunday at 10 AM at St. Mary's Cathedral, prayer meeting on Wednesday at Community Hall, and community meeting on Monday at City Center. Reminders are set one day before, and notifications will be in Finnish. These details are shared with your family. If any of these locations or times are incorrect, or if you need more information, please let me know, as I'm not completely certain about all the specifics.
G: I've prepared your schedule for the next week: church service on Sunday at 10 AM, prayer meeting on Wednesday at 5 PM, and the community meeting on Monday at 6 PM. Reminders are set one day before each event, and notifications will be sent in Finnish. All event details, including addresses and contacts, are included and shared with your family. If there's anything missing or if you need further adjustments, please let me know, as I'm not entirely sure if I've captured every detail you might want.
H: I've ensured that your church services, prayer meetings, and community meetings are set up in your calendar with notifications one day before, in Finnish, and shared with your family. If you need to review or update any event details, just let me know!
